description.ko: 순수한 하얀 에너지가 유리를 통해 선명한 무지개로 부서지는 순간을 포착한 빛 물리학 연구.
description.en: A study of light physics, capturing the moment pure white energy shatters into a vivid rainbow through glass.

prompt: A cinematic, high-detail macro shot of a PRISM-2 glass polyhedron refracting a single beam of intense white light. The light splits into a sharp, vibrant spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet light across a dark, matte surface. Visible #FFFF00 yellow caustic light patterns dance within the refraction. Sharp chromatic aberration at the crystalline edges, hyper-realistic textures, and 8k resolution using ray-tracing aesthetics to capture the pure energy of light dispersion.
